name: agent_brief
description: Intelligence brief for any Virtuals/ACP agent. Input: agentName — accepts numeric agent ID (e.g. 12446), exact agent name (e.g. AnonSentinel), or URL (app.virtuals.io/acp/agent-details/12446). Numeric ID is the most reliable — find it on agdp.io or app.virtuals.io. Output: agentId, name, description, category, walletAddress, token, metrics {isOnline, successfulJobs, successRate, uniqueBuyers}, offerings[], resources[]. Use cases: due diligence before hiring, agent discovery, agent review. Triggers: agent brief, agent info, who is, agent lookup, find agent, agent profile.

agentName.description: Agent numeric ID (recommended, e.g. '12446'), exact name (e.g. 'AnonSentinel'), or URL from agdp.io / app.virtuals.io
